query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total_sellers FROM sellers; SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT productId) as products_with_sellers FROM sellers; SELECT s.storeName, s.facilityId, s.floor, p.name as product_name, p.prefecture FROM sellers s JOIN products p ON s.productId = p.id LIMIT 5;
